emails.subject: equity trading in the U.K.
emails.body: equity trading in the U.K. Paul: Just checking to see if you are the lawyer monitoring equity trading in the U.K. I am charged with the oversight of Gary Hickerson's equity activity here in Houston and I want to coordinate with the London lawyer. Please advise. Also, I heard that you were recently married. Congratulations! Sara Shackleton Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3801a Houston, Texas 77002 713-853-5620 (phone) 713-646-3490 (fax) sara.shackleton@enron.com

emails.subject: Re: equity trading in the U.K.
emails.body: Re: equity trading in the U.K. Sara Thanks for the note and good wishes! Probably wondering what I'm doing in the office on a Sundy as a newly-wed:catching up on email! Justin's group deal with equity trading; Jonathan Marsh will cover on the regulatory side. Hope things are fine back at the ranch and going well for you. Regards Paul From: Sara Shackleton on 13/03/2001 13:17 CST

emails.subject: Re: equity trading in the U.K.
emails.body: Thanks for the reply! Paul Simons 03/18/2001 07:36 AM
